--- a/model.py

@@ -9,7 +9,6 @@
         self.avg = nn.AvgPool1d(kernel_size=kernel_size, stride=stride, padding=0)

 

     def forward(self, x):

-        # x: [B, L, C]

         pad = (self.kernel_size - 1) // 2

         front = x[:, 0:1, :].repeat(1, pad, 1)

         end = x[:, -1:, :].repeat(1, pad, 1)

@@ -62,3 +61,24 @@
         seasonal = self.linear_seasonal(seasonal.transpose(1, 2))

         trend = self.linear_trend(trend.transpose(1, 2))

         return (seasonal + trend).transpose(1, 2)

+

+

+class HybridDLinearForecaster(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, seq_len: int = 96, pred_len: int = 720, n_features: int = 7, individual: bool = True, kernel_size: int = 25, dropout: float = 0.1):

+        super().__init__()

+        self.seq_len = seq_len

+        self.pred_len = pred_len

+        self.n_features = n_features

+        self.base = DLinearForecaster(seq_len=seq_len, pred_len=pred_len, n_features=n_features, individual=individual, kernel_size=kernel_size)

+        self.residual = nn.Sequential(

+            nn.Flatten(),

+            nn.Dropout(dropout),

+            nn.Linear(seq_len * n_features, pred_len * n_features),

+        )

+        nn.init.zeros_(self.residual[-1].weight)

+        nn.init.zeros_(self.residual[-1].bias)

+

+    def forward(self, x):

+        base = self.base(x)

+        res = self.residual(x).view(x.size(0), self.pred_len, self.n_features)

+        return base + res
